title: low budget textures
description: this changes minecraft textures to be low budget or "low quality"
body: this texture pack adds new textures for mineraft and they are of course you guessed it LOW BUDGET cuz i just wanna make a texture pack but i dont have a giant team and its only me so yeah dive into the world of shitty minecraft with the best textures youve ever seen because you will fall in love with them (or get a heart attack) btw my superflat world not included so dont ask for it
